name: Kalmyk
notes: Kalmyk Oirat (хальмг келн) of Kalmykia, written in a Cyrillic alphabet with extra letters (ә, ө, ү, җ, ң, һ). The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Kalmyk spelling interacts with vowel harmony, reduced/short vowels in non-initial syllables that are often written but not pronounced, and the Russian-derived letters used only in loans; a reliable letter → IPA table requires a descriptive source that has not been consulted. The historic Clear Script (Todo bichig) is not covered. Metadata only.
